params.name: Ouroboros Statue
params.description: This unique trinket is Astaroth's reward for her subordinates. The small coiling snake on it is her servant. The ouroboros-like shape allows the magic power to circulate within its body, enabling long-term use of it so that Astaroth can monitor its owner however she likes.
